description_long: This is a medium-sized dog with a lean, athletic build and a short, dense coat. Its fur is primarily a mix of brown, black, and tan, with a distinctive black saddle pattern along its back and lighter tan coloring on its legs, face, and underbelly. The dog's ears are large, upright, and pricked, giving it an alert and attentive expression. Its tail is long, bushy, and held straight out behind the body. The eyes are almond-shaped and expressive, set in a face with a pronounced muzzle and black nose. There is no visible collar or leash, and the overall appearance closely resembles a German Shepherd.
description: A medium-sized, athletic dog with a black saddle pattern, pricked ears, and a bushy tail held straight. Its coat is a mix of brown, black, and tan, resembling a German Shepherd.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dog's symmetrical face, pricked ears, and straight legs, highlighting its alert posture.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the black saddle pattern, bushy tail, and the dog's lean, muscular build.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the straight alignment of the back, the bushy tail, and the symmetry of the hind legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same coat pattern, tail position, and upright ear.
